economic_notes: First Nation owns 1/7 interest in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway Nation land at Scanterbury, MB). Also owns 51% of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (heavy equipment construction company). Wanipigaa-Sibi Development Corporation also consolidated.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain financial records for Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (51% owned). Consolidated entity includes 5 departments/entities on line-by-line basis plus South Beach Casino LP on modified equity method and WERI Construction on proportionate consolidation (51%). Budget information not fully available - departure from PSA standards noted. Demand loan of $1,327,452 related to legal claim against Government of Canada. CMHC replacement reserve is underfunded by $188,747. Construction in progress of $5,038,081 includes Women's Shelter, Ice Rink/Splash Park, and Band Housing. Net debt position of $5,409,059.
